visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene starts indoors, likely a bedroom or living room with soft warm lighting. A young woman with long brown hair has thick white creamy mask goop applied unevenly across her face. She holds a white bowl and a light blue spatula, gesturing energetically towards a large grey rectangular mat she holds up, which resembles a bathroom floor mat. (2) The camera transitions to a medium close-up as she demonstrates the product. She pours a thick, viscous white liquid from a large black stand-up pouch into a white bowl. She then uses a black pump bottle to add a yellowish essence into the mixture. The lighting is bright, highlighting the glossy texture of the liquid. (3) A close-up shot shows her face with a more neatly applied white mask. She uses a white plastic spatula to spread the cream-like substance on her cheek. The background is slightly blurred, focusing on her facial expressions and the smooth application of the product. (4) The woman is seen peeling off a large, rubbery piece of the dried white mask from her chin and cheek. Her skin underneath appears very smooth, shiny, and hydrated. She smiles and touches her cheek with her finger to demonstrate the 'bouncy' texture of her skin. (5) In the final phase, she holds the white bowl and spatula again, talking directly to the camera with high animation. Promotional text and graphics detailing prices and gift sets are overlaid on the screen. The background shows a home interior with some furniture and clothes visible in the distance.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: ⚠️台灣人不知道的軟膜的真相. [Slogan]: 這種粉狀軟膜. (2) [Variety]: 不如你把. [Variety]: 硅藻土地墊 用在臉上. (3) [Slogan]: 軟膜通常主成分是硅藻土. (4) [Slogan]: 沒什麼高級保養成分!. (5) [Variety]: !!!. (6) [Slogan]: 現在韓國女生都在用. [Slogan]: 奶霜軟膜. (7) [Slogan]: 不需加水!!!. [Slogan]: 尤其Oable AB軟膜. [Slogan]: 不用加水👌. (8) [Slogan]: +而加高級精華🌱. (9) [Slogan]: 他們的A劑可以用 20次. [Slogan]: 容量超大😍😍. (10) [Slogan]: 採用「Cream」乳霜質地❤️. (11) [Slogan]: 還有高濃度精華 B1·B2. (12) [Slogan]: 用完皮膚變得超Q彈. [Slogan]: 整個臉看起來透亮💙. (13) [Variety]: 粉到處飛? 水量超難抓?. (14) [Slogan]: Oable奶霜軟膜不會🥰. (15) [Subtitle]: (傳統軟膜). (16) [Slogan]: Oable奶霜軟膜👍. (17) [Logo]: 🇰🇷韓國Oable奶霜軟膜. [Slogan]: 台灣最初. [Slogan]: 爭取到台灣最低價💗. (18) [Slogan]: 套組直接免費贈送 官方道具 🎁. (19) [Slogan]: 想跟團的人記得確認 我的IG主頁裡面連結.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a white strapless or off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical modern home interior with white walls, soft ambient lighting, and some household items like a clothes rack and furniture visible in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy female voice speaking rapidly in Mandarin, accompanied by a bright, upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 128 BPM. The vocal tone is extremely enthusiastic. A 'ding' SFX sounds as the mat is shown. (2) A subtle 'pop' sound effect occurs during the transition to the close-up. The sound of pouring thick liquid into the bowl creates a low-frequency squelching noise. The woman's voice maintains high arousal, emphasizing the product name 'Oable'. (3) Mechanical clicking sounds are heard as she pumps the essence bottle several times. The BGM remains consistent in the background, providing a cheerful drive to the narration. (4) A soft rustling sound of a plastic pouch being handled is audible. The voice rises in pitch when describing the 'Q-dan' (bouncy) feeling of the skin. A 'whoosh' SFX accompanies the scene transition where she peels the mask. (5) The final segment features a rapid-fire promotional pitch. The voice remains authoritative and energetic. Small 'ding' SFX highlight the presentation of free gifts and pricing tiers before the audio cuts out cleanly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Evidence -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote the Oable Cream Modeling Mask by debunking traditional powder-based masks and highlighting the ease and effectiveness of the advertised product. It utilizes a high-energy, vlog-style presentation to demonstrate the product's unique liquid-to-cream application and its skin-brightening results, concluding with a call-to-action for a limited-time group buy offer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly shows the product packaging, demonstrates its use, mentions the brand name multiple times, and provides a specific link for a group buy and discount details.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high density of text overlays and fast-paced editing typical of social media beauty content to maintain viewer engagement and deliver information quickly.
